texto: A likely impossibility is always preferable to an unconvincing possibility. The story should never be made up of improbable incidents
autor: there should be nothing of the sort in it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de there should be nothing of the sort in it. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “A likely impossibility is always preferable to an unconvincing possibility. The story should neve…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, aristotle, poetics, útil em momentos de poetics.
